sentence_reviews.text: Linear and generalized linear models predict through a weighted sum of features, optionally passed through a link function chosen for the target distribution.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, Ch. 5 machine-learning basics on linear models and logistic regression; PML, generalized linear models / linear and logistic regression topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: The weighted-feature and link-function characterization is standard and supported across the cited textbook topics, but the packet source pointer is broad rather than an exact passage.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Affine transforms & dense layers, Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy.
